RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS LUIS GUZMAN, CARMEN GUZMAN AND SANDRA ESCOTO GUZMAN'S Motion For Leave To File A Second Amended Complaint is granted. A reasonable excuse for the delay in filing a Second Amended Complaint exists and the opposing party will not be prejudiced by the amendment. C.C.P. 473(a)(1). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
